experimental_conditions.treatment: Macular neural retinas from left donor eyes exposed to intense light

data_processing: The raw sequencing data was processed by the Cell Ranger software (v3.0.2, 10x Genomics)
Human refence genome (GRCh38) was used for accurate mapping of the sequencing readouts and quantification of gene expression
Assembly: GRCh38
